\section{Cheatsheet Grid Contract}

\begin{HypoCheatsheetGrid}[columns=3,gap=compact]
\begin{HypoCheatsheetCell}[type=formula,title={Derivative Rules},priority=high,span=2,keep=true]
Remember:

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
Power rule: \(x^n \to n x^{n-1}\)
\item
Chain rule keeps the \textbf{inner derivative}.
\end{itemize}

\[
\frac{d}{dx}\sin x = \cos x
\]

Use \texttt{sympy.diff()} for quick checks.
\end{HypoCheatsheetCell}

\begin{HypoCheatsheetCell}[type=workflow,title={Build Loop},priority=medium,span=1,keep=false]

Edit the Markdown.
\item
Run \texttt{hypolatex build}.
\item
Inspect the generated PDF.
\end{enumerate}
\end{HypoCheatsheetCell}
